---
title: "Stephen Roger Moore"
---

## Stephen Roger Moore

**Dates:** (fl. 1823-1845)

### Description

cousin-in-law of FMY

### Biography

The Mr Moore mentioned in the 1840s is assumed to be Stephen Roger Moore, who married (Otterbourne 1823) FMY\'s first cousin Mary Kingsman (b.<i>c.</i> 1785).  They evidently lived in or near Otterbourne.

### Letters

- Letter from 25 September 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
